svg.aria-label: CUTLINE architecture — a control plane (Next.js app on Vercel) supervising a data plane (a separate long-running BullMQ worker) over a Redis backbone. One sentence enters, a 12-stage pipeline renders it, and a finished MP4 is uploaded to Vercel Blob.
svg.text: One sentence in, one video out.
system architecture · control plane over data plane
APP · Next.js route handlers (stateless, on Vercel)
edge · CSP / HSTS · X-Frame DENY · SSRF guard · webhook signature
▼ WORKER PROCESS — Railway / Render / Fly · long-lived · tsx · CPU 1–3 min
DATA PLANE · THE SEPARATE LONG-RUNNING WORKER
cancelled-jobs SET · checkCancelledAndThrow between every stage
each stage = pure fn · own POST endpoint · replay · bisect
VEO RAI filter → VeoContentFilteredError → LLM reword ×2 → actionable fail
Better Auth identity + passkey · user_plan_overrides · brand_kits
Next 16.1.6 · React 19.2.3 · TypeScript 5 · Remotion 4 · BullMQ 5 + ioredis 5 · Better Auth 1.5.5 · Dodo Payments · Zod 4 · @google/genai 1.39 · HeyGen · ElevenLabs / PlayHT
